sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89047" key="prosembateu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεμ-βᾰτεύω</orth>, <sense id="n89047.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">continue dalliance</tr_>, prob. cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προσεμματεύω</foreign> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:2:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
